rationale: Adding new feature (comment parameter on aggregate); Improvement type with DRIVERS dependency, not a prior nonconformance.
Retryable writes spec says driver must not retry on standalone; driver incorrectly throws error instead of proceeding.
Internal architectural refactor moving server session pool; no spec rule violated, addresses usage pattern concern.
API documentation build failure (CAKE/SHFB tooling error); no driver behavior or spec involved.
CRUD spec explicitly says collation on servers <3.4 MUST raise error; driver was not enforcing this requirement.
Driver sends maxTimeMS as BSON double; spec requires integral millisecond value, server rejects fractional values.
C#-specific serialization behavior on upsert _id generation; no CRUD spec rule explicitly addresses driver object mapping.
Feature request for BSON serialization convention to skip empty collections; no spec requirement involved.
Feature request to expose maxTimeMS via LINQ API; API ergonomics, no spec violation.
EndOfStreamException on replSetReconfig after topology change; implementation issue, no specific contradicted spec rule.
FormatException due to GUID representation mismatch in ListCollections; C#-specific BSON GUID subtype handling.
FIPS compliance improvement for PasswordEvidence SHA256 usage; internal crypto implementation, no spec violation.
Test race condition in ChangeStreamOperationTests when database doesn't exist yet; test infrastructure flakiness.
Driver fails to split bulk writes at 100k limit as required by spec; batch splitting not working correctly.
Implementing a spec change to reduce session leaks; Improvement driven by SPEC-1030, driver was not previously wrong.
Sessions spec requires gossiping the greater ClusterTime; driver always appends session value instead of the maximum.
Sessions spec requires implicit sessions for all operations; legacy API was not using implicit sessions.
EndOfStreamException in cursor MoveNext when batch >64KB; buffer reading implementation bug, not a spec rule violation.
Timeout on replSetInitiate via direct connection in 2.5.0 regression; insufficient detail to identify specific spec rule violated.
Incorrect variable used in ArgumentException error message in BsonBinaryData constructor; minor code bug, no spec rule.
Description explicitly states: 'must set the server type to Unknown... This is per the SDAM spec.'
Improvement to include error code and codeName in exception message; error message quality, not a spec conformance issue.
Improving test framework to auto-detect replica set topology; test infrastructure improvement, not driver behavior.
NullReferenceException when options argument is null; null argument handling bug, no spec rule about null safety.
Deprecating snapshot option per spec change (SPEC-1033); Improvement implementing spec update, driver was not previously wrong.
Extended JSON spec allows any element order in $timestamp; driver only handles one order, failing JSON-driven tests.
BSON extended JSON v2 spec defines $numberInt; driver missing support for this required extended JSON form.
Re-sync transaction spec tests for new UnknownTransactionCommitResult label tests per DRIVERS-505; test file sync.
Explicitly states C# enables revocation checking 'in contrast to the shell and the Python driver'; filed to align default.
Driver sends duplicate txnNumber field when retryWrites=true inside a transaction; spec requires retryWrites off in transactions.
Implementing spec update for startAtOperationTime handling per DRIVERS-506; Improvement following spec amendment, not a pre-existing bug.
Request to provide C# transactions code example for documentation; docs work, no spec or driver behavior involved.
Test .NET Core SNI support; empty description, testing/validation task with no identified spec violation.
Resync retryable writes spec tests per DRIVERS-476; test file synchronization, not a driver behavior fix.
Session Dispose calls AbortTransaction after CommitTransaction; spec prohibits aborting an already-committed transaction.
Command monitoring JSON tests failing because server added codeName field; test runner needs updating, not driver behavior.
Adding heartbeat and SDAM state transition logging for debugging connectivity issues; observability improvement, no spec rule.
Bug in C# documentation example code in transaction retry section; documentation fix, no driver behavior violation.
LINQ IQueryable Join operation fails in specific chain scenario; C#-specific LINQ translation bug, no spec area applies.
Random CLR20r3 crash event in MongoDB.Bson; thin description, no spec violation identifiable.
Pin Cake.Git to 0.18.0 due to .NET Standard 2.0 breaking change; build dependency issue, no driver spec involvement.
CI Evergreen build verbosity improvement for debugging; build infrastructure change, no driver behavior involved.
GSSAPI auth starts SASL with empty payload; auth spec defines SASL initiation, server 3.7+ rejects this old behavior.
Reduce Evergreen CI test matrix by dropping redundant auth+SSL combinations; CI configuration change, no spec involvement.
Description explicitly states 'According to the spec this value is a Timestamp'; driver deserializes ClusterTime as BsonDocument instead.
Adding logging for silently-ignored exceptions in SDAM code; observability/debugging improvement, no spec rule violation.
Invalid BinaryConnection state transition on replica set failover; internal connection state machine bug, no spec rule contradicted.
Refactor TcpStreamFactory to use Socket.ConnectAsync now available in .NET Standard 1.5; implementation improvement, no spec.
GridFS upload stream missing Close() override for NETSTANDARD2_0; .NET-specific class hierarchy bug, not a GridFS spec rule.
Change stream cursor incorrectly raises resumable exception post-election; spec defines resume semantics; parallel bug found in JAVA-2858.
